name: Iso11783OPChangeEndPoint
title: Iso11783OPChangeEndPoint
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeEndPoint( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword width, dword height, dword direction );
description: The function changes the length and alignment of a line object. A Change End Point command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of the line object

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the bounding rectangle of the object

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the bounding rectangle of the object

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Alignment of the line 0: from top/left to bottom/right1: from bottom/left to top/right

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
